name: Bad Gastein
description: Bad Gastein is good for you – welcome to your outdoor paradise. Hiking, mountain biking, skiing – the mountains are always calling. Or choose the relaxing tranquillity of the Felsentherme or the famous Heilstollen, not far from your holiday apartment.

name: Saalbach
description: Welcome to Saalbach, your home in the Kitzbühel Alps! Hiking, biking, or skiing – your adventure starts right on your doorstep. Shops, cafés, and restaurants are within walking distance, and Zell am See is approx. 30 minutes' drive away.

name: Salzburg
description: Mozart welcomes you! Your holiday apartment is nestled in the heart of Salzburg, where alleyways wind through the city. Baroque gems, the cathedral, Hohensalzburg Fortress, and the birthplace of the century-old genius are all just a stone's throw away.

name: Sonnleitn
description: Elation with every breath – your holiday apartment at 1400 meters above sea level, is located in a cosy Carinthian-style house. Sonnleitn is a spectacular hiking and winter sports area, with major shopping facilities just half-an-hour away by car.

name: St. Michael
description: Outdoor fans rejoice – your holiday apartment is located in St. Michael, where everything is possible: Skiing, biking, golfing, and more. Shops and restaurants are within walking distance, and the city of Salzburg is not far away.

name: Vienna
description: "Servus in Wien" – your holiday apartment situated in the noble 8th district in the heart of Vienna. The Hofburg, the Burggarten, and the city's art and cultural highlights are all within easy reach, and nearby Mariahilfer Strasse is a shopping paradise.

name: Zell am See
description: Detox your body, mind, and soul in Zell am See. Your holiday apartment is located in the state of Salzburg. Here you can enjoy sporting activities such as skiing, hiking, golfing, biking and boating. Shops and restaurants are in the immediate vicinity.

name: The Crane Resort
description: There are so many activities that can add to your Barbados holiday experience. Visit one of Barbados’ many lush gardens and see the vivid colours of the local flora. Learn how rum was made or better yet, sample the many varieties after the tour. Discover the island's fascinating underwater world while snorkelling or diving. A visit to our beautiful historic sites is also highly recommended.

name: Petram Resort & Residences
description: Enjoy a luxury destination offering breathtaking views of the Adriatic Sea, modern accommodations, and amenities like a rooftop infinity pool, fine dining, and a spa. Its location near cultural landmarks, pristine beaches and vineyards makes it perfect for relaxation and exploration.

name: Prague
description: Welcome to the Golden City! Your holiday apartment is located right on Wenceslas Square, in the heart of Prague. It's the perfect spot to begin your discovery: the Vltava River, Prague Castle, and traditional coffee houses are just a short walk away.

name: Punkaharju
description: Where time takes a break – your log cabin is surrounded by nature, near the water. Fishing, kayaking, boating, cross-country skiing – or just relaxing – it's all enjoyable here. The village of Punkaharju and shopping facilities are just a short drive away.

name: Antibes
description: Bienvenue in Southern France! Antibes lies on the charming Côte d'Azur between Nice and Cannes, directly on the sea. Beaches, coastal paths, the historic old town, the beach promenade, and the harbour are all within easy reach from your holiday apartment.

name: Château de Chabenet
description: Immerse yourself in a true fairy tale: the castle rises majestically at the heart of vast, lush parkland. Combining serenity and convenience, the property is located just minutes away from restaurants and shopping streets.

name: Houseboats Midi
description: Cast off! When you're traveling by houseboat on the waterways of the Canal du Midi, the landscapes roll by and nature shows itself in all its glory. Cities like Narbonne, Béziers, and especially the imposing fortified city of Carcassonne await!

name: La Madrague
description: Bienvenue to your holiday apartment in Provence. The sea isn't far away, the coastal paths of the Calanques are oh-so-inviting, and the port city of Marseille is always worth a visit. There are shops, weekly markets, and charming restaurants close by.

name: Paris
description: Bienvenue! Your holiday apartment situated in the heart of Paris. The Louvre and the shopping temptations of the Galerie Lafayettes are close by. The city of love offers variety, culture, art, and an irresistible charm.

name: Berlin Gendarmenmarkt
description: Your holiday apartment is located in the centre of Berlin, with easy access to the Brandenburg Gate or Potsdamer Platz. This cosmopolitan city is full of cultural highlights, museums, Checkpoint Charlie, and countless shopping opportunities.

name: Berlin Zoo
description: Your holiday apartment is located near the Zoologischer Garten station, with easy access to Kudamm, Tiergarten, and Alexanderplatz. Experience Berlin as it lives and breathes – history, culture, the famous nightlife, and countless shopping opportunities.

name: Binz
description: If you're ready for a holiday, you're ready for Rügen! Your holiday apartment is not far from the endless, white sandy beach and its chalk cliffs. The Sellin pier, the Southeast Rügen Biosphere Reserve, and the Jasmund peninsula are also nearby.

name: Braunlage
description: The Harz Mountains at its heart: Your holiday apartment in Braunlage is the ideal starting point for hikes, mountain biking or winter sports in the nature park. The town offers variety, a cosy park, cafés and restaurants plus various other activities.

name: Dresden
description: Welcome to one of the most beautiful cities in Germany. Your holiday apartment is centrally located, right by the Frauenkirche and Semper Opera House. From here you can discover the city with its art, culture, history, and unique flair.

name: Hamburg
description: Moin, moin! Your holiday apartment located in the heart of Hamburg. From here you can easily explore the Hanseatic city. The harbour, Speicherstadt, the Elbphilharmonie, musicals, theatre, and Miniaturwunderland are all within a stone's throw. Cast off.

name: Houseboats Müritz
description: Ship ahoy! The Mecklenburg Lake District is the ideal area for a houseboat holiday without the need for a boat licence. Countless lakes, untouched nature and attractive harbour towns invite you to take a break from your daily life.

name: Hörnum
description: Wellness for the soul! Your holiday apartment is practically on the Wadden Sea. From here you can reach the harbour, take in the Sylt Aquarium, explore nature reserves, or enjoy the romantic lighthouses. There are restaurants and shops nearby too.

name: Munich
description: Munich likes you! Your holiday apartment is centrally located on a very vibrant street between Stachus and Theresienwiese. The sights and shopping streets can be reached in no time on foot, by bike, or with public transport.

name: Unterkirnach
description: Welcome to the source of the Danube – your holiday apartment is located in family-friendly Unterkirnach in the Black Forest. Great day trips await you, and shopping facilities are close by. The next larger town is about ten minutes away by car.

name: Westerland Aalborg
description: Welcome to the North Sea! Your holiday apartment is only a few minutes away from the heart of Westerland. From here you can easily enjoy yourself: Enjoy the island's culinary highlights, relax, experience the city and beach – all on your doorstep.

name: Westerland Dünenblick
description: Welcome to the North Sea! Your holiday apartment is located in Westerland, where you'll enjoy proximity to the beach and a charming village life. Beautiful walks, fun in the sand, and culinary highlights with an urban and Nordic flair are all within reach.

name: Westerland Margarethenhof
description: Welcome to the North Sea! Your holiday apartment is only a few minutes away from the heart of Westerland. From here are many options – from the city to the beach, and all the culinary highlights in between. Or just take some time to relax.

name: Winterberg
description: Hurray for the Hochsauerland! Your holiday apartment is located in Winterberg, a popular destination for athletes and wellness enthusiasts. The largest skiing area north of the Alps is waiting on your doorstep, shops as well as restaurants are also nearby.

name: Athens
description: Your holiday apartment is located in the heart of Athens, close to the historic old town, The Acropolis, and several other sights. Off you go to enjoy discovery tours, culinary delights, shopping, or nightlife. This city is like a journey through time.

name: Damnoni
description: The Greek sun is smiling here. Your holiday apartment is very close to the beach and sea. In Damnoni there are local shops and delicious restaurants, and Crete offers a variety of excursion possibilities.

name: Porto Heli
description: Enjoy to the sound of the sea – Your holiday apartment is located on the wonderful Peloponnese Riviera. The sun is smiling, bathing bays with crystal-clear water are on the doorstep! The swimming pool, restaurant, shop and wellness area invite you to linger.

name: Budapest
description: Your holiday apartment is right in the historic castle district. It's the perfect starting point for exploring the city on the Danube, with its rich culture, wonderful architecture, and unique thermal baths like Széchenyi.

name: Cannero
description: Dolce Vita, per favore! Your holiday apartment sits above a small harbour on Lake Maggiore. Locarno, Como, and Milan are all nearby, and there are a wide variety of hiking and excursion possibilities in the surrounding area, including the market in Luino.

name: Cavallino Treporti
description: Benvenuti! Your holiday apartment located between the Adriatic coast and the Venetian Lagoon – the beach is basically at your doorstep. Plenty of possibilities for outdoor activities are nearby, and the gorgeous city of Venice is less than an hour away.

name: Cefalù
description: Where the sun is smiling – your holiday apartment is surrounded by a citrus plantation and the Sicilian sea is practically at your doorstep. The surrounding area offers numerous excursion possibilities as well as local shops, markets, and restaurants.

name: Merano
description: Welcome to the hearty South Tyrol. Your holiday apartment is surrounded by an idyllic landscape full of ridgeways, pilgrimage routes, sports, and wellness possibilities. Hiking, biking, climbing – the Dolomites are looking forward to your visit.

name: Pentolina
description: Benvenuti! The sun smiles and the heart soars in Tuscany. Your holiday apartment is located in a medieval village. There is a restaurant, childcare, and several excursion and sports possibilities. Siena, Florence, and Pisa are all well worth a visit.

name: Scerne di Pineto
description: Sun, swimming, mountain scenery – welcome to Scerne di Pineto! Your holiday apartment is practically at the seaside. Walk along the beach, stroll through weekly markets, and enjoy a variety of shops and restaurants, all close by.

name: Tonda
description: Tipico Tuscany! Your holiday apartment is located in Tonda, a lovingly renovated medieval village with its own restaurant. The surrounding area offers plenty of hiking and other sporty opportunities. Florence, Siena, and Pisa are not far away.

name: Marrakech
description: Exotic inspiration – Your holiday apartment is in the heart of the Palmeraie Oasis, between Marrakech and the Atlas Mountains. Vibrant energy awaits those who like to explore, while the wellness area or the surrounding golf courses ensure relaxation.

name: Amsterdam
description: Your holiday apartment is located right in the city centre. There’s a lot more to Amsterdam than Van Gogh and Heineken: The canals are a UNESCO world heritage site, and there’s plenty of culture, hospitality, markets, museums, green parks and, and, and.

name: Albufeira
description: Sunny days in Portugal? Here you go: The Algarve offers an extensive coastline, great beaches, bays for swimming, family fun, golf courses, sailing trips, the wistful sounds of Fado, and much more. Your holiday apartment at the Hapimag resort awaits you.

name: Lisbon
description: Bem-vindos a Lisboa! Your holiday apartment is located right in the city centre, near the Avenida da Liberdade. The perfect starting point to discover the contrasts of Portugal: charm and perfection, tradition and modernity, serenity and joie de vivre.

name: Marbella
description: The Andalusian sun welcomes you! Your holiday apartment is located right on the Costa del Sol. Enjoy the good mediteranean food and life while relaxing at the pool or on our rooftop terrace. Restaurants, bars, and shops offer everything your heart desires.

name: Mas Nou
description: Bienvenido to Mas Nou, on a high plateau on the Costa Brava. Your holiday apartment is located next to a beautiful golf course, and there are forests nearby for hiking. Girona and the Dali Triangle are about an hour away, Barcelona is an hour-and-a-half.

name: Paguera
description: Bienvenido to the Balearic Islands! The Mallorca sun always awakens feelings of happiness. Your holiday apartment is in a prime beach location, and the surrounding area is full of hiking trails, restaurants, shopping, and excursions like Port d'Andratx.

name: Puerto de la Cruz
description: Welcome to Tenerife, the Island of Eternal Spring! Your holiday apartment is located in Puerto de la Cruz. The black sand beach and the Martiánez lagoon are close by, and Teide National Park is a true hiker's paradise.

name: San Agustín
description: Sunshine is good for the soul. Your holiday apartment is located between the mountains and the coast of Gran Canaria, practically on San Agustìn beach. Shops and restaurants are close by, and the mild climate makes hiking and water sports a pleasure.

name: Andeer
description: Breathe deep in the Swiss Alps: Andeer has 400 kilometres of hiking trails that wind through nature. There are mineral baths, bike trails, and a family friendly skiing area in Splügen-Tambo. One holiday apartment – thousands of possibilities.

name: Ascona
description: Benvenuti to Switzerland’s sunniest corner! Your holiday apartment is located in Ascona, next to Locarno. Lake promenades, museums, events, restaurants, and a lido are nearby. The Maggia Valley, Centovalli and Lake Maggiore welcome hiking enthusiasts.

name: Flims
description: Hurray for the Swiss Alps! Your holiday apartment is practically on the ski slope. Flims is an outdoor and hiking paradise, and variety is guaranteed. Lake Cauma, the Tectonic Arena Sardona, and Chur are always worth a visit.

name: Interlaken
description: Welcome to your holiday apartment in beautiful Interlaken. Take in views of the Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau right from your doorstep. This town is an outdoor paradise, with plenty of ski slopes and hiking trails nearby, all framed by the Swiss Alps.

name: Reka holiday village Blatten - Belalp
description: Experience peaceful hiking moments on the Belalp, with a challenging tour to the Sparrhorn at almost 3,000 metres, from where there is a spectacular view of the Aletsch Glacier and the Aletschhorn. For a more leisurely option, the trail leads from Belalp to Alteschbord, from where you can also enjoy a wonderful view of the glacier.

name: Bodrum
description: Bodrum has it all: your own holiday apartment, private peninsula, and private bay. You'll also enjoy Turkish hospitality, sun, the beach, a swimming pool, a large wellness and water sports offering, restaurants and shops – all right there in the resort.

name: Bowness-on-Windermere
description: Welcome to the heart of the Lake District. Your holiday apartment is nestled in a unique landscape that includes England's deepest lake and its highest mountain. Brockhole on Windermere is a must visit, this Lake district national Park attraction offers something for all.

name: Edinburgh
description: Your holiday apartment is located in the middle of the city, in a classic Victorian building. Shopping, festivals, golfing – in Edinburgh, there's something for everyone. Culture, art, and the castle are all right on your doorstep.

name: London
description: Welcome to your holiday apartment in the heart of London. It's located in a Victorian palace, directly on Hyde Park. Several highlights including the Tower of London, Tate Modern, London Eye, and the theatre district can be reached easily and quickly.
